mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_error_book (user_id, question_id, is_mastered, review_count, consecutive_correct, review_interval_days, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, 0, 0, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT eb.id, eb.question_id, q.type AS question_type, q.difficulty, q.content AS question_content, q.options, q.answer, q.explanation, q.subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, eb.error_reason, eb.is_mastered, eb.review_count, eb.consecutive_correct, eb.review_interval_days, eb.next_review_at, eb.created_at, eb.updated_at FROM t_error_book eb INNER JOIN t_question q ON eb.question_id = q.id LEFT JOIN t_subject s ON q.subject_id = s.id WHERE eb.user_id = #{userId} AND eb.is_mastered = 0 AND (eb.next_review_at IS NULL OR eb.next_review_at <= NOW()) ORDER BY eb.next_review_at ASC
